title: Physically validate T-Deck native BLE LCI service
description:
After the LICHEN-specific native BLE LCI service is implemented and T-Deck BLE egress is wired, validate on physical LilyGO T-Deck hardware with a real BLE central. Record advertised UUIDs/name, negotiated ATT MTU, pairing behavior, connect/disconnect logs, and bidirectional SLIP-framed IPv6/LCI packet evidence. This task requires physical hardware and is not completable in native_sim.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Physical T-Deck hardware revision, firmware commit, and flashing path are recorded.
- BLE scanner or central evidence records advertised service UUIDs/name, pairing behavior, and negotiated ATT MTU.
- Logs show connect, bidirectional SLIP-framed IPv6/LCI packet exchange, and disconnect cleanup.
- The Bead remains blocked until native LCI UUID implementation, native_sim service-shape tests, and T-Deck BLE egress wiring are complete.
